summary: The discv4 test-utils divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in mock discovery Poll::Ready returns; no test event behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 121: M	crates/net/discv4/src/test_utils.rs.
The isolated patch only changes two `return Poll::Ready(Some(MockEvent::...))` expressions to semicolon-terminated forms.
No mock ping/pong/neighbours event construction, target address, stream state, or test utility behavior changed.
